statements.status_notes: Duplicate of #137853. Go stdlib CVE-2026-25679 in kubectl v1.35.3 (built with Go 1.25.7); fixed in Go 1.25.8 / 1.26.1. Reporter mistyped the ID as 'CVE-2026-2567'. Linked to #137853 as the tracking issue. Remediated via Go bump. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/138040]
